title: OSINT and passive reconnaissance
description: Gather intelligence about the target using only open-source and passive techniques — no direct contact with target systems.
acceptance_criteria: Organizational structure and key personnel identified
Technology stack inferred from public sources
Email format and domains enumerated
Exposed credentials or leaked data checked
Public-facing infrastructure mapped

title: Active infrastructure enumeration
description: Actively enumerate target network ranges, domains, subdomains, and exposed services.
acceptance_criteria: All in-scope IPs and subdomains enumerated
Open ports and running services documented
VPN, remote access, and edge services identified
Cloud infrastructure and S3/blob storage enumerated

title: Initial access — exploit entry point
description: Exploit the identified attack vector to gain initial foothold. Document the vulnerability and proof of access.
acceptance_criteria: Initial access confirmed with shell or credential access
Exploitation method documented with request/response PoC
Access level (user/service/admin) documented
Persistence mechanism considered before proceeding

title: Establish persistence
description: Establish a reliable, durable foothold that survives reboots and security response.
acceptance_criteria: Persistence mechanism established and tested
Backdoor/implant documented for cleanup
Detection risk assessed and documented

title: Lateral movement and internal reconnaissance
description: Move through the internal network to reach high-value targets. Map internal network and trust relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Internal network topology mapped
Additional credentials or access tokens discovered
Lateral movement path documented hop-by-hop
High-value targets (Domain Controllers, DBs, secrets vaults) identified

title: Objective completion and data collection simulation
description: Reach and demonstrate access to defined engagement objectives (crown jewels, sensitive data, domain admin).
acceptance_criteria: Engagement crown jewel accessed with screenshot/proof
Simulated exfiltration technique documented
Cleanup plan prepared for all implants and artifacts
tool_hints: exfil simulation only — no real data taken

title: Cleanup and generate engagement report
description: Remove all red team artifacts, backdoors, and implants. Generate full engagement report.
acceptance_criteria: All persistence mechanisms removed and verified
All implants and backdoors cleaned up
Full kill chain documented with ATT&CK mapping
Detection gaps documented with blue team recommendations
